notes: Regression coverage for the live-hybrid passthrough gate on `product(id:)` queries that embed a proxy-synthetic gid as an inline GraphQL literal (not via $variable). Before the fix, `local_has_product_id` only scanned the variables dict, so the inline literal slipped past the synthetic-marker check and the request was forwarded to Shopify (where it 404s and leaks the synthetic id upstream). The empty `upstreamCalls` cassette acts as the gate: a regression would surface as a cassette miss (proxy 502 → ProxyStatus error from the runner) instead of passing.
